customer.lifeStage: Late 20s, married, considering starting a family

home.title: OCBC FutureOS
home.subtitle: From Managing Money to Managing Life Outcomes
home.guardianStatus: Your Future Self Guardian is monitoring your long-term goals.

lifeGraph.title: Life Graph
lifeGraph.subtitle: Understands your life, goals and OCBC product needs

futureMirror.title: Future Mirror
futureMirror.subtitle: Simulates how today's choices affect tomorrow

guardian.title: Future Self Guardian
guardian.subtitle: Protects your long-term goals with approved actions

lifeGraph.title: Life Graph
lifeGraph.subtitle: Your personal financial life map powered by OCBC FutureOS.
lifeGraph.noDetectedNeeds: No needs detected from your current goals and financial health signals.
lifeGraph.strategySentence: Life Graph does not recommend random products. It builds a financial strategy around your life goals.

futureAnalyst.title: Future Analyst
futureAnalyst.riskValue: Cash pressure and protection gaps are monitored before large commitments.
futureAnalyst.nextValue: Run Future Mirror before approving any major spending plan.

stages.marriageHome: Planning Marriage + Preparing for First Home

future.meaning: What it means: overall readiness to fund selected life goals without weakening long-term stability.
future.method: How it is calculated: weighted savings, debt, emergency, insurance and investment readiness.
future.data: Data used: income, expenses, savings, loans, credit card balance, investments, insurance status and selected goals.
future.improve: How to improve: reduce unsecured debt, protect emergency cash, automate savings and keep investment contributions steady.

savings.meaning: What it means: strength of liquid savings against monthly expenses and planned goals.
savings.method: How it is calculated: savings compared with the six-month expense reserve and goal funding needs.
savings.data: Data used: current savings, monthly expenses, selected goals and target amounts.
savings.improve: How to improve: create goal pockets and schedule salary-day transfers.

debt.meaning: What it means: how safely current loans and card balances fit the customer's income.
debt.method: How it is calculated: total debt pressure compared with annual income.
debt.data: Data used: existing loans, credit card outstanding and monthly income.
debt.improve: How to improve: lower card balances, avoid new debt for non-essential spending and keep repayments predictable.

emergency.meaning: What it means: ability to handle unexpected expenses before touching long-term goal funds.
emergency.method: How it is calculated: protected liquid cash compared with six months of expenses.
emergency.data: Data used: current savings and monthly expenses.
emergency.improve: How to improve: ring-fence emergency savings and stop reallocations below the protected reserve.

insurance.meaning: What it means: whether protection is ready for family, housing and income risks.
insurance.method: How it is calculated: prototype score based on the saved insurance status and selected family or home goals.
insurance.data: Data used: insurance status, relationship status and selected goals.
insurance.improve: How to improve: review life, health, critical illness and family protection needs with an adviser.

investment.meaning: What it means: readiness to grow long-term wealth while keeping near-term cash safe.
investment.method: How it is calculated: investment amount compared with income and risk preference.
investment.data: Data used: investment amount, income, risk preference and retirement goal.
investment.improve: How to improve: maintain monthly investment contributions and align the portfolio with risk preference.

strategy.modalDetail: This strategy is coordinated inside the three visible systems: Life Graph maps the need, Future Mirror simulates the impact, and Future Self Guardian protects the plan.

savings.title: Savings Strategy
savings.detail: Creates goal pockets and salary-day transfers around selected goals.

investment.title: Investment Strategy
investment.detail: Keeps long-term growth active while near-term goals are funded.

insurance.title: Insurance Strategy
insurance.detail: Checks protection gaps before home, family or business risks grow.

credit.title: Credit Strategy
credit.detail: Controls card and loan pressure so goals do not become debt-led.

mortgage.title: Mortgage / Loan Strategy
mortgage.detail: Prepares down payment, affordability and readiness signals.

emergency.title: Emergency Fund Strategy
emergency.detail: Protects cash reserves before optional spending or investment changes.

productFit.title: OCBC Product Fit
productFit.purpose: Life Graph connects customer goals to OCBC-related product categories.
productFit.disclaimer: Prototype recommendation only. Customers should check full product details with OCBC before applying.

why.ocbc360: Monthly salary and goal savings can be coordinated from one main account.
why.monthlySavings: A recurring savings habit supports planned goals without relying on leftover cash.
why.homeLoan: A first-home goal needs early mortgage readiness and down-payment planning.
why.roboInvest: Long-term investment growth can continue while cash goals are protected.
why.greatTerm: Home and family goals create protection needs that should be reviewed early.
why.payments: Approved transfers make goal funding visible and predictable.
why.ocbc365: Daily spending can be tracked responsibly while card balances stay controlled.

supports.ocbc360: Wedding savings, emergency fund and home down payment
supports.monthlySavings: Custom goals, wedding goals and emergency buffer
supports.greatTerm: Family protection, income protection and home ownership
supports.payments: Monthly transfers, PayNow and GIRO savings routines
supports.ocbc365: Responsible spending and household cash-flow tracking

impact.ocbc360: Improves savings discipline and goal progress.
impact.monthlySavings: Turns large goals into smaller monthly steps.
impact.homeLoan: Improves readiness before any credit application.
impact.roboInvest: Keeps long-term compounding visible in the plan.
impact.greatTerm: Reduces protection gaps before life events become urgent.
impact.payments: Reduces missed transfers and keeps the Guardian plan active.
impact.ocbc365: Helps prevent spending drift while preserving rewards use.

productFit.escalatedNotice: {product} has been queued for Relationship Manager review.
productFit.prototypeTag: Prototype reference — not verified for production

evidence.title: Suitability evidence
evidence.noConflict: No conflict with protected goals detected.
evidence.limitation: This is a prototype estimate, not a verified product quote or approval.
evidence.humanReviewRequired: Relationship Manager or licensed review required before execution.
evidence.humanReviewNotRequired: No human review required for this category at this autonomy level.

dataUsed.wealth: Current investments, risk preference and current savings {savings}.
dataUsed.loans: Current savings {savings}, target down payment, and HDB/BTO planning context.

risk.savings: Low risk. Funds remain liquid and deposit protection applies.
risk.payments: Low risk. Transfers are reversible before settlement and require approval.
risk.wealth: Market risk. Value can fall as well as rise; not suitable for short-notice cash needs.
risk.insurance: Premium cost and lock-in risk. Cancelling early may forfeit paid premiums.
risk.loans: Long-term debt and interest-rate risk over the loan tenure.
risk.cards: Debt risk if the outstanding balance is not paid in full each month.

alternative.savings: Keeping funds in the existing account without opening a new product.
alternative.wealth: Continuing to build the emergency fund before increasing investment contributions.
alternative.insurance: Reviewing existing coverage with a licensed advisor before adding a new policy.
alternative.loans: Continuing to save toward a larger down payment before applying.
alternative.cards: Using the existing debit account until existing balances are reduced.

conflictReason.emergencyBelowTarget: Emergency fund readiness is {score}/100, below the safe threshold. Liquidity should be protected before higher-risk growth.
conflictReason.highDebtLoad: Debt health is {score}/100. Adding discretionary credit is not recommended while existing debt is elevated.
conflictReason.mortgageReadinessWeak: Savings strength is {score}/100. Mortgage affordability should improve before applying.

conflictCheck.emergencyBelowTarget: Checked against the Emergency Fund goal — conflict found (score {score}/100).
conflictCheck.highDebtLoad: Checked against existing debt load — conflict found (score {score}/100).
conflictCheck.mortgageReadinessWeak: Checked against down-payment readiness — conflict found (score {score}/100).

customGoal.title: Add Custom Goal
customGoal.added: {goal} added to Life Graph and Future Mirror.

actionCentre.title: Action Centre
actionCentre.subtitle: Approve, modify or reject AI actions.

monitoring.title: Goal Monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: Track protection of every financial goal.

aiReasoning.title: AI Reasoning
aiReasoning.subtitle: Understand why Guardian made this recommendation.

reputation.title: Guardian Reputation
reputation.subtitle: How much autonomy Guardian has earned

goalLedger.title: Goal Ledger
goalLedger.subtitle: See the lifecycle state behind every protected goal

today.expectedImpactValue: {goal} stays protected and the Future Score is projected at {score}/100.

reasoning.tradeoffsValue: Balanced {goals} against cash safety, debt pressure, protection gaps and long-term retirement security.

strategy.savingsDetail: Reserve {monthly} monthly toward {goal} while keeping cash flow visible.
strategy.investmentDetail: Keep long-term contributions active without weakening short-term liquidity.
strategy.insuranceDetail: Review protection before home, family, or income risk increases.
strategy.debtDetail: Keep credit and loan pressure controlled before new commitments.
strategy.emergencyDetail: Protect the emergency reserve before optional spending or product changes.

actionCentre.goalLockDetail: Level 5 is active, so FutureOS can reserve savings within approved limits only.
actionCentre.preparedSubtitle: Review the actions Future Self Guardian prepared from your simulation.

rejectionReview.message: You have skipped this suggestion {count} times. Guardian will stop repeating it - did your priorities, budget, or comfort with this change?

report.goalProgressValue: {goal} remains on track under the Guardian plan.
report.scoreChangeValue: Projected score is now {score}/100 after approved safeguards.

history.recommendationDetail: {goal} strategy reviewed against cash flow, risk and long-term goals.
history.actionApprovedDetail: Customer-approved banking action added to the monitoring plan.
history.actionSkippedDetail: Guardian recorded this preference and will not repeat the same suggestion without new evidence.

memory.title: Guardian Memory
memory.subtitle: Your AI remembers your financial journey and continuously improves future decisions.

modal.whyText: This memory helps Future Self Guardian improve future recommendations because it understands the customer's past decisions, goals and financial behaviour.

wedding.title: Created Family Planning Goal
wedding.description: Guardian built a long-term family readiness plan.
wedding.action: Recommended a monthly family-readiness buffer and created a protection roadmap.
wedding.reason: {customer} selected Family Planning as a major life goal.
wedding.data: Selected goals, monthly income, current savings, insurance status and expected family costs.

emergency.title: Started Emergency Fund Protection
emergency.description: Guardian protected emergency savings from wedding overspending.
emergency.action: Separated emergency savings from wedding planning cash flow.
emergency.reason: Wedding spending could reduce cash safety before the first-home plan.
emergency.data: Emergency fund balance, monthly expenses, planned wedding budget and savings behaviour.

home.title: First Home Readiness Activated
home.description: Guardian prepared the customer for mortgage readiness.
home.action: Created a down-payment readiness track and monitored debt pressure.
home.reason: The first-home target needed early mortgage preparation.
home.data: Home target year, savings, loan balance, card outstanding and monthly income.

family.title: Family Planning Detected
family.description: Guardian identified future family protection needs.
family.action: Flagged protection gaps before future family commitments.
family.reason: Life stage signals showed upcoming family planning needs.
family.data: Life stage, insurance status, family goal, savings and future expense assumptions.

salary.title: Salary Increase Detected
salary.description: Guardian increased investment allocation after income growth.
salary.action: Suggested increasing investment allocation while preserving emergency savings.
salary.reason: Higher income created room for long-term wealth building.
salary.data: Monthly income, investment balance, risk preference and retirement target age.

protectedScoreInfo.meaning: What it means: how strongly the selected plan protects long-term goals after the Guardian recommendation.
protectedScoreInfo.method: How it is calculated: combines Future Mirror score, approved action coverage, emergency reserve protection and goal stability.
protectedScoreInfo.data: Data used: selected goals, simulator result, approved actions, savings, expenses, debt and risk preference.
protectedScoreInfo.improve: How to improve: approve the recommended actions, keep emergency funds protected and review the plan monthly.

services.title: OCBC Services / Execute
services.subtitle: Approved actions connect FutureOS recommendations to realistic OCBC banking services.
services.success: {action} approved. FutureOS has updated the execution status.

open360.title: Open OCBC 360 Account
open360.what: Prepares a salary and goal-savings account for automated saving flows.
open360.why: It gives {goal} a clear funding source without mixing money with daily spending.

creditCardApplication.title: Apply for OCBC Credit Card
creditCardApplication.what: Creates a mock card application readiness step with spending guardrails.
creditCardApplication.why: It helps maintain credit access while keeping repayment risk visible.

roboInvest.title: Start OCBC RoboInvest
roboInvest.what: Sets up a mock RoboInvest starter plan aligned to the risk preference.
roboInvest.why: It keeps long-term wealth building active while protecting near-term cash needs.

insuranceReviewService.title: Apply for Great Eastern Insurance Review
insuranceReviewService.what: Schedules a mock insurance review for life, health and family protection gaps.
insuranceReviewService.why: It reduces the chance that {goal} is disrupted by uninsured life risks.

homeLoanCheck.title: Home Loan Eligibility Check
homeLoanCheck.what: Runs a mock mortgage-readiness check against savings, debt and income.
homeLoanCheck.why: It shows whether future borrowing can stay comfortable before commitments increase.

relationshipManager.title: Book Relationship Manager
relationshipManager.what: Books a mock advisory appointment for product and goal review.
relationshipManager.why: It gives complex decisions a human checkpoint before customer-approved execution.

monthlySavingsService.title: Schedule Monthly Savings
monthlySavingsService.what: Schedules a recurring mock transfer into the selected goal wallet.
monthlySavingsService.why: It makes progress automatic after approval and lowers the chance of missed savings.

goalWalletTransfer.title: Automatic Goal Wallet Transfer
goalWalletTransfer.what: Moves approved amounts into a protected FutureOS goal wallet.
goalWalletTransfer.why: It separates {goal} money from discretionary spending while keeping customer control.

portfolioRebalance.title: Investment Portfolio Rebalancing
portfolioRebalance.what: Prepares a mock portfolio adjustment based on risk preference and liquidity needs.
portfolioRebalance.why: It prevents short-term goals from weakening retirement and investment readiness.

protectionReview.title: Insurance Protection Review
protectionReview.what: Creates a mock protection checklist for income, health and critical illness gaps.
protectionReview.why: It helps protect {goal} against risks that savings alone may not cover.

bandDetail.restricted: No autonomy increase; review required and proactive intervention reduced.
bandDetail.underReview: Explain and recommend only until issues are resolved.
bandDetail.buildingTrust: Eligible for recommendation and negotiation; no execution without approval.
bandDetail.trusted: Eligible for Level 4 action preparation and approval workflows.
bandDetail.highlyTrusted: Eligible to offer Level 5 guardrails if you explicitly opt in.

reputation.noViolations: No consent violations recorded. A confirmed violation would immediately restrict this category until reviewed.
reputation.formulaNote: Guardian Reputation Score is a prototype scoring model for product behaviour, not a regulated financial formula. It only affects whether Guardian may request more autonomy - it never executes anything on its own.

goalLedger.intro: Every protected goal moves through explicit states - it can never silently jump from planning to execution, or from a setback to abandonment.

obligation.draft: Ask only for missing data needed to make the goal usable.
obligation.committed: Create baseline plan, thresholds, and review rhythm.
obligation.monitoring: Track progress, detect drift, and report changes.
obligation.atRisk: Alert, explain impact, show affected goals, and prepare recovery options.
obligation.recovery: Track recovery effectiveness and revise if recovery is failing.
obligation.paused: Stop actions, preserve history, and keep read-only planning only if allowed.
obligation.completed: Produce completion review, outcome evidence, and next-step options.
obligation.abandoned: Record reason without judgment and protect remaining goals.
obligation.escalated: Freeze unsafe autonomy and explain why review is required.

trigger.customerConfirmedGoal: Customer confirmed the goal and committed to monitoring.
trigger.targetAchieved: Customer marked the goal as complete.
trigger.riskExceededAutonomy: Risk exceeded the current autonomy level and was escalated for review.
trigger.recoveryResolved: Recovery plan resolved the drift; monitoring resumed.
trigger.customerReopenedGoal: Customer reopened this goal as a new draft.
trigger.riskThresholdCrossed: A protection score dropped below the safe threshold.
trigger.riskCleared: The protection score recovered above the safe threshold.

contract.title: Shared Goal Contract
contract.goalStatementValue: Protect and grow progress toward {goal}, as defined by the customer.

boundaries.savings: Goal savings should not be redirected to discretionary spending without explicit review.
boundaries.emergency: The emergency fund balance should not be spent for non-emergency purposes without review.
boundaries.investment: Long-term investment contributions should not be paused to fund short-term spending without review.
boundaries.insurance: Insurance coverage should not lapse or be reduced without a suitability review.
boundaries.debt: New debt should not be taken on for this goal without checking repayment capacity.
boundaries.future: Future-facing goals should not be deprioritised without an explicit customer decision.
boundaries.custom: This custom goal's boundaries follow the priority and notes the customer provided.

customerRole.draft: Confirm the goal details and consent scope so Guardian can start monitoring.
customerRole.committed: Confirm the baseline plan, thresholds, and review rhythm.
customerRole.monitoring: Review progress periodically and approve any prepared actions.
customerRole.atRisk: Review the alert and choose to accept a recovery plan or adjust the goal.
customerRole.recovery: Track the recovery plan and confirm once the goal stabilises.
customerRole.paused: Resume the goal when ready and reconfirm consent.
customerRole.completed: Decide on a next-step goal if desired.
customerRole.abandoned: Reopen the goal anytime if priorities change.
customerRole.escalated: Wait for review to complete or provide additional context if requested.

escalation.active: Relationship Manager review is available now.
escalation.standard: Escalates to Relationship Manager review only if risk exceeds Guardian's current autonomy level.

exitCondition.draft: Exits when the customer confirms the goal and moves it to monitoring, or discards it.
exitCondition.committed: Exits once the baseline plan and monitoring begin.
exitCondition.monitoring: Exits when the goal is paused, completed, abandoned, or a risk threshold is crossed.
exitCondition.atRisk: Exits when the customer accepts a recovery plan, the risk clears, or it is escalated.
exitCondition.recovery: Exits when the recovery plan resolves the drift or the goal is escalated.
exitCondition.paused: Exits when the customer resumes the goal and reconfirms consent.
exitCondition.completed: Closed once the completion review and next-step options are produced.
exitCondition.abandoned: Exits if the customer reopens the goal as a new draft.
exitCondition.escalated: Exits when the review resolves and monitoring can safely resume.

reason.planning: Guardian is building a strategy for a goal that has not been committed yet.
reason.monitoring: Guardian is tracking your active goals and watching for drift.
reason.atRisk: A protected goal has crossed a risk threshold and needs your attention.
reason.recovery: A revised plan is being tracked to restore an at-risk goal.
reason.awaitingApproval: Guardian has prepared actions that are waiting for your approval.
reason.completed: All of your protected goals have reached their target.
reason.escalated: A goal needs human or policy review before Guardian can continue.
reason.paused: Consent has been withdrawn, so Guardian has stopped autonomous behaviour.

confidence.body: {confirmed} of {total} key profile fields are customer-confirmed rather than assumed defaults, combined with Guardian's current reputation.
confidence.method: Calculated from how much of the profile is customer-confirmed versus still an assumed default, weighted against Guardian Reputation Score.

loading.detail: OCBC FutureOS is connecting life goals, products, and approved AI actions.

wedding.title: Wedding Budget Planning
wedding.subtitle: FutureOS protects home and retirement goals while the customer plans a meaningful wedding.
wedding.success: Wedding budget plan locked. FutureOS will monitor spending against the approved limit.

home.title: Home Down Payment Preparation
home.subtitle: FutureOS prepares the customer for a first home while keeping other goals stable.
home.support1: Ring-fence down payment funds from wedding spending.
home.support2: Track HDB or condo affordability scenarios.
home.support4: Trigger alerts if monthly savings fall behind.
home.success: Home readiness track created. Mortgage preparation and down payment monitoring are active.
home.sgContextDisclaimer: Singapore housing context (HDB/BTO) shown here is general planning awareness, not a verified HDB/BTO integration.

housingContext.bto: BTO flats are usually cheaper but come with a multi-year building wait before key collection - plan your savings timeline around the expected wait, not just the down payment date.
housingContext.resale: Resale flats are available sooner but usually cost more upfront - your down payment and mortgage readiness matter earlier than with a BTO.

home.cpfContext: Your CPF Ordinary Account savings may also count toward a down payment or monthly instalments - check your CPF Housing Usage Statement for your actual entitlement.
home.scoreBody: Your home readiness is {score}% because your current fund of {currentFund} covers this much progress toward the {target} down payment target.
home.scoreMethod: Calculated from your savings strength (income, expenses, and current savings) scaled against your down payment target for a {housingType} flat.

emergency.title: Emergency Fund Protection
emergency.subtitle: FutureOS keeps short-term safety intact while other life goals move forward.
emergency.rec1: Prevent wedding overspend from touching emergency cash.
emergency.rec3: Send alerts if balance drops below threshold.
emergency.success: Emergency fund protected. FutureOS will block risky reallocations from this reserve.
emergency.scoreBody: Your emergency readiness is {score}% because your current fund of {fund} covers {months} months of expenses.
emergency.scoreMethod: Calculated as current fund divided by monthly expenses, scored against a 6-month target of {recommendedFund}.

insurance.title: Insurance Readiness
insurance.subtitle: FutureOS identifies protection gaps before the customer starts a family.
insurance.support1: Review life and health coverage before home loan commitment.
insurance.support3: Connect advisory appointment when both customers approve.
insurance.support4: Keep recommendations separate from automated execution.
insurance.scheduledDetail: Readiness review scheduled. Future Self Guardian will monitor protection gaps and remind you before the home loan commitment.
insurance.success: Insurance readiness review scheduled. Guardian will monitor family protection gaps.

investment.title: Long-term Investment Planning
investment.subtitle: FutureOS keeps retirement compounding alive while funding near-term life events.
investment.success: Balanced investment plan applied. FutureOS will review progress every 3 months.
investment.cpfContextDisclaimer: This plan covers private investments only. Your CPF savings, the CPF Retirement Sum framework, and any Supplementary Retirement Scheme (SRS) contributions are a separate, important part of retirement readiness - check your CPF and SRS statements for your current balance and projected payout eligibility age.

weddingPlanner.title: Wedding Planner
weddingPlanner.subtitle: Describe the wedding you want and get a market-grounded budget, tailored to you.
weddingPlanner.success: Wedding budget confirmed. Guardian will help you plan the savings next.
weddingPlanner.inputPlaceholder: e.g. A wedding at Marina Bay, around 150 guests, elegant but not extravagant, June next year
weddingPlanner.emptyStateBody: Describe the wedding you're imagining - style, guest count, venue, location, date, and any activities you want - and we'll research current market pricing to put together real options for you.
weddingPlanner.genericError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
weddingPlanner.customActivityPlaceholder: Describe any other activity you'd like to add
weddingPlanner.memoryEventImpact: Wedding fund goal of {amount} added to your financial plan.
weddingPlanner.memoryEventAction: Guardian researched current market pricing and helped confirm a wedding budget scoped only to this goal.
weddingPlanner.memoryEventReason: You confirmed a specific plan after comparing market-grounded options.
weddingPlanner.memoryEventDataUsed: Wedding requirements you described, plus current Singapore wedding market pricing.
weddingPlanner.savingsPlanCtaBody: Based on your real income, expenses, and current savings, we'll put together a savings strategy tailored to funding this wedding - not just a plain monthly split.
weddingPlanner.savingsInputPlaceholder: e.g. This monthly amount feels too high, can you suggest another way?

checkins.genericError: Something went wrong logging that. Please try again.

homePlanner.title: Home Purchase Planner
homePlanner.subtitle: Describe the home you want and get market-grounded pricing, with real MAS/IRAS figures calculated for you.
homePlanner.success: Home purchase plan confirmed. Guardian will help you plan the down payment savings next.
homePlanner.inputLabel: Tell us about the home you want
homePlanner.inputPlaceholder: e.g. A 4-room BTO or resale flat in Punggol or Sengkang, just for the two of us, first-timer Singapore citizens
homePlanner.emptyStateBody: Describe the home you're imagining - BTO or resale, condo or HDB, how many people will live there, which area, new or resale - and we'll research current market pricing and calculate real down payment, loan, and stamp duty figures for you.
homePlanner.genericError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
homePlanner.customRequestPlaceholder: e.g. Can you look at Bishan instead, or a bigger unit?
homePlanner.savingsPlanCtaLabel: Now let's plan the down payment savings
homePlanner.savingsPlanCtaBody: Based on your real income, expenses, and current savings, we'll put together a savings strategy tailored to funding this down payment - not just a plain monthly split.
homePlanner.savingsInputPlaceholder: e.g. This monthly amount feels too high, can you suggest another way?
homePlanner.memoryEventImpact: Down payment goal of {amount} added to your financial plan.
homePlanner.memoryEventAction: Guardian researched current market pricing and calculated real down payment, loan, and stamp duty figures for a home purchase plan scoped only to this goal.
homePlanner.memoryEventReason: You confirmed a specific plan after comparing market-grounded options.
homePlanner.memoryEventDataUsed: Home requirements you described, plus current Singapore property market pricing and official MAS/IRAS financing rules.

retirementPlanner.title: Retirement Planner
retirementPlanner.subtitle: Describe the retirement you want and see real CPF LIFE numbers calculated for you.
retirementPlanner.success: Retirement plan confirmed. Guardian will help you plan the savings next.
retirementPlanner.inputLabel: Tell us about the retirement you want
retirementPlanner.inputPlaceholder: e.g. I want to travel the world for a few years, then settle into a comfortable life in Singapore
retirementPlanner.emptyStateBody: Describe the retirement lifestyle you're imagining - staying local, traveling the world, somewhere in between - and we'll research realistic costs and calculate your real CPF LIFE payout and funding gap.
retirementPlanner.genericError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
retirementPlanner.customRequestPlaceholder: e.g. Can you factor in more travel, or a more modest lifestyle?
retirementPlanner.savingsPlanCtaBody: Based on your real income, expenses, and current savings, we'll put together an investment strategy tailored to closing this retirement income gap - not just a plain monthly split.
retirementPlanner.savingsInputPlaceholder: e.g. This monthly amount feels too high, can you suggest another way?
retirementPlanner.memoryEventImpact: Target retirement income of {amount}/month added to your financial plan.
retirementPlanner.memoryEventAction: Guardian researched realistic lifestyle costs and calculated real CPF LIFE payout and funding gap figures for a retirement plan scoped only to this goal.
retirementPlanner.memoryEventReason: You confirmed a specific plan after comparing market-grounded options.
retirementPlanner.memoryEventDataUsed: Retirement lifestyle you described, plus current cost-of-living research and official CPF Board formulas.

cpfInputStep.title: A few details for your CPF projection
cpfInputStep.body: This helps us calculate your real CPF LIFE payout, not just guess it.
cpfInputStep.skipHint: Leave the CPF balance fields blank and we'll estimate them from your income.

simulator.title: Future Mirror
simulator.subtitle: See the future impact before you choose.
simulator.trustNote: FutureOS never executes financial actions without customer consent. Autonomous actions only happen within approved limits.

inputs.situationPlaceholder: Describe your situation, for example: I want to spend SGD 80,000 on my wedding while buying a home in 3 years.

2.title: Recommend
2.detail: AI compares options and recommends the best one.

3.title: Negotiate
3.detail: AI balances competing goals and suggests trade-offs.

4.title: Act with Approval
4.detail: AI prepares an action plan but requires customer approval.

5.title: Autonomous Guardrails
5.detail: AI executes pre-approved actions within safe limits.

modal.title: Enable Autonomous Goal Lock
modal.message: You are enabling Autonomous Goal Lock. FutureOS will automatically reserve money for this goal within your approved limit. You can pause or adjust anytime.

output.adviceOnly: Level 1 is advice only. FutureOS explains the possible futures without showing execution controls.
output.tradeoffs: FutureOS negotiates between the selected life goals, cash safety, product readiness, and long-term security.
output.success: Future Self Guardian recommendation applied. FutureOS will monitor your progress.

conservative.title: Conservative Future
conservative.detail: Lower spending or slower timeline, stronger savings, lower risk.

balanced.title: Balanced Future
balanced.detail: Recommended balance between the selected goal, cash safety, and long-term health.

highRisk.title: High-Risk Future
highRisk.detail: Higher spending or faster timeline, weaker financial safety.

tone.1: Advice tone: informative, no execution buttons.
tone.2: Recommendation tone: selects the best future without autonomous action.
tone.3: Negotiation tone: explains trade-offs across competing goals.
tone.4: Approval tone: prepares actions for customer review.
tone.5: Autonomous tone: prepares pre-approved actions with safety limits.

explain.protectedGoals: Protected goals: {goals}, cash safety, and long-term financial health.
explain.products: OCBC support: goal savings, automated transfers, insurance review, mortgage readiness where relevant, and investment planning.

output.dynamicSummary: FutureOS is analysing {goal} across the selected goals: {goals}.

pending.title: Ready for consent
pending.detail: FutureOS has prepared this action, but it will not be included until the customer approves it.

approved.title: Consent captured
approved.detail: This action is approved for the Guardian plan and will be included when the recommendation is applied.

editing.title: Edit requested
editing.detail: FutureOS keeps this action in review mode. It will not execute until the customer approves the edited version.

skipped.title: Skipped
skipped.detail: This action is excluded from the current Guardian plan.

savingsGoal.safety: Goal funds stay separate from spending money.

monthlyTransfer.safety: No transfer happens until the final Guardian recommendation is applied.

emergencyFund.safety: FutureOS will not recommend moving money below this reserve.
emergencyFund.next: Monitor balances and warn before risk rises.

insuranceReview.safety: Recommendation only. No insurance purchase is made.
insuranceReview.next: Prepare advisory questions for customer review.

mortgageReadiness.next: Track down payment, debt load, and eligibility signals.

investmentPlan.safety: No trade or rebalancing happens without explicit approval.
investmentPlan.next: Monitor risk preference and portfolio gap.

autonomousLock.title: Autonomous Goal Lock
autonomousLock.pausedNotice: Autonomous execution paused. Guardian will ask for your approval before the next transfer.
autonomousLock.adjustNotice: Autonomy lowered to Level 4 so you can change the locked plan - Guardian will ask for approval on the next transfer.
autonomousLock.withdrawImpactBody: Withdrawing consent stops all autonomous transfers immediately. Guardian will switch to advice-only until you re-approve a permission level. Manage this from Profile > Privacy.

reasoning.situation: FutureOS understands this as a {goal} decision that must fit the customer's cash flow and long-term goals.
reasoning.carRisk: Buying too quickly may weaken cash flow and increase credit repayment pressure.
reasoning.customRisk: Acting immediately may reduce the emergency buffer or create avoidable debt.
reasoning.customRecommendation: For your {goal} goal, FutureOS recommends saving {monthly}/month toward {amount} instead of buying immediately, because it protects your emergency fund and avoids credit card debt.
reasoning.nextActionCustom: Create a guarded savings pocket for {goal} and monitor progress monthly.
reasoning.weddingRisk: A higher wedding budget can reduce cash reserves and delay other important future goals.
reasoning.weddingRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it protects the wedding plan while keeping cash safety and retirement on track.
reasoning.weddingAction: Lock a wedding savings goal and use spending alerts before deposits are paid.
reasoning.homeRisk: A weak down payment path can reduce mortgage readiness and increase future borrowing stress.
reasoning.homeRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it keeps the property target realistic while protecting savings.
reasoning.homeAction: Prepare a home down payment track and check mortgage readiness monthly.
reasoning.emergencyRisk: Insufficient emergency coverage leaves the customer exposed if income or expenses change.
reasoning.emergencyRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it rebuilds protection without freezing every other goal.
reasoning.emergencyAction: Ring-fence emergency savings and automate top-ups after salary crediting.
reasoning.retirementRisk: Reducing investment contributions now can delay financial independence later.
reasoning.retirementRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it preserves compounding while funding near-term goals.
reasoning.retirementAction: Keep a monthly investment rhythm and review the retirement gap quarterly.
reasoning.investmentRisk: Chasing return without a cash buffer can create volatility at the wrong time.
reasoning.investmentRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it grows investments while keeping risk controlled.
reasoning.investmentAction: Adjust the investment plan to match the selected risk preference and review every quarter.
reasoning.familyRisk: Family planning without insurance and cash readiness can create future protection gaps.
reasoning.familyRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it prepares family costs while protecting savings.
reasoning.familyAction: Review insurance readiness and build a family cost buffer.
reasoning.businessRisk: Launching too fast can drain reserves and shorten cash runway.
reasoning.businessRecommendation: Future Self Guardian recommends the Balanced Future because it funds startup capital while preserving emergency cash.
reasoning.businessAction: Create a startup capital plan and separate business risk from household reserves.

guardian.title: AI Guardian Preferences

privacy.title: Privacy & Consent
privacy.description: FutureOS only performs autonomous actions with your permission.

permissions.executeActions: AI may execute approved banking actions

privacy.withdrawnNotice: Consent withdrawn. Autonomous Banking has been disabled.
privacy.relationshipResetNotice: Relationship reset. Goals return to Draft, autonomy returns to Level 1, and Guardian settings return to default - your profile and Guardian Memory are kept.

terms.title: Terms & Data Usage
terms.description: Understand how customer data is protected.
terms.policyText: FutureOS uses approved customer data only for financial simulations, planning recommendations, and consented autonomous actions. Customers remain in control at all times.
terms.downloadedNotice: Your local FutureOS data file has been downloaded.
terms.deletedNotice: Local FutureOS demo data has been reset.

demo.title: App Information
demo.description: Product version and local prototype controls.
demo.clearNotice: Simulation cleared. Future Mirror is ready for a fresh run.
demo.restoreNotice: Mock data restored. FutureOS is back to the default customer profile.

profile.title: Profile Details
profile.savedHint: Saved automatically and shown on Home.

info.futureScore: Future Health Score is a weighted mock score built from the customer's goal progress, cash buffer, liabilities, protection readiness, and retirement projection.
info.wedding: Wedding Goal measures progress toward the Guardian-recommended SGD 35,000 wedding budget.
info.selected: Selected Goal is the active first-home readiness goal currently being protected by Future Self Guardian.
info.emergency: Emergency Fund measures how much of the target safety reserve remains protected after planned spending and debt obligations.
info.retirement: Retirement Goal measures projected retirement capital at age 62 against the target capital needed for a secure retirement.
info.family: Family Planning measures whether cash reserves and insurance readiness can support future household needs.

homeBanking.customiseText: Choose which shortcuts appear on your home screen.
homeBanking.logoutText: Your secure session remains protected. No real banking sign-out is performed in this prototype.

method.futureScore: FutureOS normalises each module to 0-100, then combines them with higher weight on protected goals and liquidity. It is a transparent prototype model, not a live credit or investment decision.
method.wedding: Progress equals protected wedding savings divided by the recommended wedding budget.
method.selected: Home readiness combines down-payment progress, target year feasibility, emergency reserve protection, and mortgage-readiness signals.
method.emergency: Emergency readiness equals protected liquid reserve divided by the six-month safety-reserve target.
method.retirement: Projected capital at age 62 is divided by the target retirement capital. Spending and debt pressure lower the score.
method.family: Family Planning combines emergency-fund strength and insurance protection readiness into one 0-100 readiness score.

proof.futureScoreInputs: Inputs: savings, investments, card balance, loan balance, goals, emergency reserve, insurance score, and retirement target age 62.
proof.futureScoreWeights: Weights: goal progress 35%, liquidity 25%, debt 15%, protection 10%, retirement 15%.
proof.futureScoreResult: Result: strong cash buffer lifts the score; retirement and insurance gaps keep it below 90.
proof.weddingInputs: Inputs: SGD 35,000 Guardian wedding plan, SGD 450/month transfer, and protected emergency reserve.
proof.weddingMath: Math: about SGD 22,400 allocated / SGD 35,000 target = 64%.
proof.weddingResult: Result: healthy but incomplete, so the monthly transfer stays active.
proof.selectedInputs: Inputs: 2030 home target, savings, emergency reserve, wedding budget, and mortgage readiness.
proof.selectedMath: Math: readiness is scored against down-payment progress and 2030 feasibility.
proof.selectedResult: Result: 72% means on track, but high wedding spending could delay the home year.
proof.emergencyInputs: Inputs: liquid savings, spending model, card balance, loan balance, and reserve rules.
proof.emergencyMath: Math: protected cash covers about 4.8 of 6 target months = 80%.
proof.emergencyResult: Result: FutureOS blocks optional reallocations below the protected level.
proof.retirementInputs: Inputs: age 62 target, SGD 85,000 savings, SGD 15,000 investments, SGD 450/month plan, 2030 home target, wedding budget, and existing debt.
proof.retirementMath: Math: projected retirement capital / target retirement capital = about 61%.
proof.retirementResult: Why lower: wedding and home cash outflows reduce compounding unless the Guardian plan stays active.
proof.familyInputs: Inputs: emergency reserve, monthly expenses, insurance status, family planning goal and current savings.
proof.familyMath: Math: emergency readiness contributes 45% and protection readiness contributes 55%.
proof.familyResult: Result: Karina has strong savings, but basic insurance keeps this score from reaching the highest band.

accountDetails.subtitle: Balance, status, recent activity and FutureOS recommendation.
accountDetails.addedToPlan: {account} added to the FutureOS monitoring plan.

info.savings: This is the current mock savings balance available for salary, daily banking and protected goal funding.
info.creditCard: This shows the mock outstanding card balance that FutureOS watches for spending risk and repayment pressure.
info.loan: This is the remaining mock personal loan balance used to estimate debt pressure and future borrowing readiness.
info.investments: This is the current mock investment value used to estimate long-term compounding and retirement readiness.
info.insurance: This score estimates how prepared the customer is for life, health and family protection needs.
info.futureGoal: This goal account shows money reserved or recommended for the active FutureOS life plan.

calculation.savings: FutureOS compares available savings, monthly expenses, emergency reserve needs and active goal transfers.
calculation.creditCard: FutureOS compares outstanding balance, recent spending, scheduled repayment and monthly cash flow.
calculation.loan: FutureOS compares remaining debt, monthly repayment, income stability and upcoming home readiness.
calculation.investments: FutureOS compares current investments, monthly contributions, risk preference and retirement target age.
calculation.insurance: FutureOS combines current protection status, family planning, mortgage readiness and coverage gap indicators into a 0-100 score.
calculation.futureGoal: FutureOS combines target amount, monthly transfer, timeline, emergency fund safety and Guardian monitoring status.

recommendations.savings: Keep this as the main salary and goal-funding account. FutureOS recommends protecting emergency cash before increasing spending.
recommendations.creditCard: Pay down outstanding card balance before adding new discretionary commitments. Future Self Guardian will flag risky spending patterns.
recommendations.loan: Keep repayments predictable and avoid new debt until the emergency reserve and priority goals are protected.
recommendations.investments: Maintain a steady investment rhythm while keeping near-term goal money separate from market risk.
recommendations.insurance: Review life and health coverage before taking on home or family commitments.
recommendations.futureGoal: {goal} is being watched by FutureOS. Current future health score is {score}/100, so approved actions should protect cash flow.

scoreInfo.body: {item} is a prototype FutureOS readiness indicator. It helps the customer understand whether the related life goal is on track.
scoreInfo.method: FutureOS combines mock profile data, selected goals, savings buffer, debt pressure, product readiness and Guardian risk rules into a transparent 0-100 estimate.

paynow.title: PayNow
paynow.subtitle: A mock transfer screen showing how OCBC quick actions can stay connected to your FutureOS plan.
paynow.note: This is mock data only. No payment will be sent in the prototype.

scan.title: Scan & Pay
scan.subtitle: A mock scan screen for QR payments during the demo.
scan.note: Camera access is disabled for the prototype. The scanner frame is visual only.

fx.title: Foreign Exchange
fx.subtitle: A mock FX screen with indicative rates for demo purposes.
fx.note: Rates are mock values and are not used for live trading.

spendingRisk.title: Spending Risk Detail
spendingRisk.subtitle: FutureOS detected a spending pattern that may affect Karina's future goals.
spendingRisk.homeDetailRisk: Monthly spending is {amount} above the safe budget of {budget}. Tap to review.
spendingRisk.homeDetailSafe: Spending is within the safe monthly budget of {budget}.
spendingRisk.detectedTitleRisk: Karina is {amount} over safe monthly budget
spendingRisk.detectedTitleSafe: Karina is within safe monthly budget
spendingRisk.detectedText: FutureOS compares income, current spending, goal commitments and emergency reserve rules to detect risk before it affects long-term outcomes.

emergency.title: Emergency Fund
emergency.detail: Higher spending can weaken the protected safety buffer.

family.title: Family Planning
family.detail: Future household costs need stable monthly cash flow.

retirement.title: Retirement Security
retirement.detail: Repeated overspending reduces long-term investment room.

recommendation.title: Guardian recommendation
recommendation.detail: Reduce non-essential spending by {amount} this month and keep emergency savings protected.
recommendation.note: FutureOS will not execute any financial action unless Karina approves it.

guardrail.title: What Guardian will do after approval
guardrail.success: Guardian Spending Guardrail is active. FutureOS will monitor spending and protect Karina's savings goals.

actions.cap: Set a soft discretionary spending guardrail of {budget} this month.
actions.alert: Send an instant alert if spending rises above the approved guardrail.
actions.protect: Keep emergency reserve and family planning funds separate from daily spending.
actions.review: Review cash flow weekly and update Guardian Memory with the decision.
